title: Fimbristylis ovata
taxonomy: Fimbristylis ovata is classified as a species of sedge, within the family Cyperaceae, which is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous flowering plants. This classification places Fimbristylis ovata within the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta. The species Fimbristylis ovata is further grouped as a member of the order Poales and the family Cyperaceae. At the genus and species level, Fimbristylis ovata is a distinct species within its genus, Fimbristylis. The exact classification of Fimbristylis ovata can be further broken down using more specific taxonomic ranks, but this provides a general overview of its classification.

This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties.
